description: The SlideSwapRegion component takes in a RectTransform of a UIX element and uses it for a slide swap. This is an internal component used by the game engine to manage things like the inventory and tutorial pages to name a couple. This isn't usable by the player in any meaningful way because of this.

fields._current: Internal - The RectTransform to swap. This component acting as a controller for what this points to.

usage: Not used by the player. used by internal game elements.
